nodes.name: EN
nodes.summary: EN表示 IUCN 濒危等级，当前关联384种鸟类，如朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭、黑脸琵鹭等384种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Giant kingbird
nodes.summary: Giant kingbird（Giant kingbird，学名 Tyrannus cubensis），在图谱中标记为濒危（EN）物种，常见栖息地包括沼泽、稀树草原，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: |date=2025 |website=DataZone |publisher=BirdLife International |access-date=July 13, 2025 }} There are also undocumented sight records in Florida. The giant kingbird primarily inhabits tall forest and the borders of rivers and swamps in the lowlands

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It also occurs in pine and mixed pine-deciduous woodlands and open swamps and dry savanna with scattered tall trees

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "The precise reasons for this species's decline are unclear, but habitat loss, and especially loss of large trees suitable for nesting, from logging and agricultural conversion may at least a contributory factor

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "The precise reasons for this species's decline are unclear, but habitat loss, and especially loss of large trees suitable for nesting, from logging and agricultural conversion may at least a contributory factor
